title: candollea capillaris
intro: Candollea capillaris, also known as Candollea, is a plant species native to Africa, belonging to the family Boraginaceae. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. Candollea capillaris has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting skin health. It can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
